title: hieracium nobile subsp. tarnense
intro: Hieracium nobile subsp. tarnense is a lesser-known subspecies of the hawkweed plant, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. Research suggests that Hieracium nobile subsp. tarnense may possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which could contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. However, more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and safety. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although these are not widely available or recommended for medicinal use.
